items.name: spy-xray
items.description: SPY-XRAY checks whether a domain behind Cloudflare has its real origin server IP exposed through subdomains, certificate transparency logs, or SPF records, then verifies candidate IPs actually serve the site before calling them a finding. Local dashboard with a live network graph, exposure scoring, and geolocation of any leaked origins.
